name: Health
description: Access health & fitness data from Google Fit (steps, calories, sleep, heart rate, weight, workouts). Works with any device that syncs to Google Fit (Fitbit, Garmin, Samsung Health, Withings, etc.). Uses the same Google OAuth as Gmail.
examples: How many steps did I take today?
What was my sleep like last night?
Show me my heart rate data for the past week
How many calories did I burn yesterday?
List my workouts from this week

commands.name: health
commands.shortDescription: Today's health summary: steps, sleep, heart rate
commands.description: Use the health_today tool to fetch today's health metrics (steps, calories burned, active minutes, heart rate). Then use health_sleep for last night's sleep summary. Present the data in a clean, motivating format with context (e.g. percentage toward daily step goal). End with one health tip based on the data.
